[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010011101 5
1 0000001010 2
2 1111101000 6
3 0110001111 6
4 1011101100 6
5 0011111111 8
6 0010111101 6
7 1111010000 5

67 1000000000 1
70 0111010101 6

60 1111010000 5 match 7
71 0000010111 4
